title: Junior Revenue Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited!
